properties.description:
The risk area is mostly on the entire domain of the map. There is a risk of isolated thunderstorms as a cold front will pass. 

*There aren't any big threats other than small hail.*

The amount of CAPE is high enough to support storms with moderate Shear and weak support from the jet steam could help organizing isolated thunderstorms.

*The main threats are wind gusts up to 60kph during isolated thunderstorms and hail size up to 2cm*

The CAPE will be up to 2000J/kg in the risk area which is high, but with the help of great wind shear, the thunderstorms should organize in the afternoon hours and go on until the night.
*The main threats are Strong wind gusts, hail size up to 3cm, torrential rain and very frequent lightning*

properties.title: Hatched area
properties.description: France has a pretty interesting setup, most models show extreme parameters, such as perfect conditions for supercells, strong wind gusts and large hail, but they also dont show initiation, because of high CIN. Thats why i have put a **HATCH**, If parcels manage to break through the CIN and initiate, they might be very strong and severe.
